summary.recommendedNextStep: Try Win+Ctrl+Shift+B, then power-cycle monitor and replug HDMI/DisplayPort before automated fixes.
safetyNotes: Classification is evidence-based suspicion, not proof.
Adapter restart requires -Apply and -Force and may blank the display.
Some remediation actions require administrator privileges.

evidence: Active resolution is exactly 640x480 with NVIDIA adapter present.
One or more monitors appear generic or non-specific.
classification.recommendedNextStep: Try Win+Ctrl+Shift+B, then power-cycle monitor and replug HDMI/DisplayPort before automated fixes.
manualSteps: Press Win+Ctrl+Shift+B to reset the graphics driver.
Power-cycle the monitor and replug the display cable.
Try another HDMI/DisplayPort cable or GPU output port.
automatedSteps: Run Fix mode with -FixLevel safe (preview first).
Consider Fix mode -FixLevel monitor with -Apply if handshake suspicion persists.
